creator: aa8vb@nc.rr.com
text:
Martti Kuparinen:
 |On Mon, 30 Jul 2001, Randall Hopper wrote:
 |
 |> The port patch applies successfully, but when building GNUCash, I get:
 |>
 |> configure:6479: cc -E -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/X11R6/include -I/usr/X11R6/include conftest.c >/dev/null 2>conftest.out
 |> configure:6475: db1/db.h: No such file or directory
 |>
 |> Where do I get the package with db1/db.h in it?  Is there a port dependency
 |> missing here?
 |
 |I saw this as well! It turned out to be something wrong in my patch file
 |as patch-a* files didn't go to gnucash/files/ and the old patch-* weren't
 |removed.
 |
 |Try this:
 |
 |    # cp -r /usr/ports/deskutils/gnucash .
 |    # patch < my-patch-file
 |    # rm gnucash/files/patch-*
 |    # mv patch-a? gnucash/files/
 |    # cd gnucash && make install clean

Thanks.  It builds, installs, and runs great now!

Randall

-- 
Randall Hopper
aa8vb@nc.rr.com
